titleStmt.title: SII 22.250: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 250. (A.R. No. 250 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VĪRA KUMĀRA KAMPAṆA (KAMPA II)—Śaka 1289 (Wrong for 1290).

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Kīlaka, Āvaṇi 2[4], Simha, śu. 5, Friday, Chitrā which would correspond to A.D. 1368, August 18. It was Āvaṇi 21 not 24. The inscription records the appointment by the temple authorities of a certain Ārya Bhāradvāji-Mudali alias Vijayaśiṅgadēva of the Bōdāyanasūtra as supervisor of the affairs of the temple assigning to him a house for his residence.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ mahā maṇḍaliśvaraṉ śrī virakumāra kampaṇayuṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 2 100 8 10 9- mel cellāniṉṟa kilaka varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 24- tiyati siṅhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pancamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
cittiraināḷ Āriyaril bhotānyasūtrattil bhāradvāji mutaliyāṉa vicaya ciṅkatevaṉukku tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭil viṭaiyiṉmel varuvārum Aṭaiyilaṉpuṭai yārum Aruḷicceytappaṭikku yikkoyilil Uṭkkaṅkāṇiyum pala mutal kaṅkāṇiyum nammuṭaiya muttiraiyu miṭṭu nammuṭaiya vācalumakak kaṭavarākavum
Ippaṭikku Ivanṉukku kuṭuttom caṉtirātittavaraiyāka Ivaṉukku maṉaiyum maṉaipaṭaippum Āṭiyaruḷuvāṉa maṉaikku vaṭakku Atiruṅkaḻalpperumāḷ maṉaikku teṟku mukkol taṟai kuṭuttom Itu caṉtirātittavaraiyāka yivaṉukku naṭakkumpaṭi kuṭuttom Ivai Āṇṭaperumāḷ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ivai cirāḻvāṉ tillai kūttapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai koyilkaṇakku Āḷavaṉtān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.250 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
